prompt: A high-fashion editorial photograph of a female model standing in an {argument name="environment" default="arid desert landscape"} with distant mountains under a soft cloudy sky. She is wearing a spectacular, structured haute couture dress made entirely of folded {argument name="dress material" default="vintage maps"}, featuring sharp, origami-like geometric layers and a strapless bodice. She has dark hair swept up, striking facial features, and wears large circular earrings resembling compasses. Surrounding her in the air are exactly 7 floating {argument name="floating objects" default="elongated compass needles with clock faces in the center"}. The image features {argument name="lighting" default="cinematic late afternoon lighting"}, casting soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the paper dress and the dry earth. Photorealistic, surreal fashion photography.
translatedPrompt: 一张超现实、电影感的高级时尚编辑肖像，一位女性站在 {argument name="landscape setting" default="干燥、多岩石且远眺群山的沙漠"} 中。她身着一件精致、蓬松的露肩礼服，整件礼服完全由 {argument name="dress material" default="折叠的复古地理地图"} 构成，呈现出锋利的折纸状褶皱和层次。她将深色头发向后梳起，佩戴着大圆环耳环。在她周围多云的天空中，漂浮着 7 个细长的菱形物体，中心带有 {argument name="floating object design" default="时钟或指南针表盘"}。光线柔和且具有电影质感，宛如午后黄金时刻，投射出柔和的阴影，突显了礼服的结构褶皱。

breakdown.creativeCore: 超现实地图礼服时尚大片：生成一张电影感、超现实的时尚肖像，展示模特身着由地图制成的折纸风格礼服，背景为沙漠。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, editorial, vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
